queries.question: For every maritime village, list the names and descriptions of the tours they offer.
queries.sql: select maritime_villages.name , boat_tours.tour_name , boat_tours.description from Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours join Boat_Tours on Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.boat_tour_id = Boat_Tours.id join Maritime_Villages on Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.maritime_village_id = Maritime_Villages.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?tour_name ?description WHERE {
  ?maritime_villages_boat_tours a :Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours .
  ?boat_tours a :Boat_Tours .
  ?maritime_villages_boat_tours p:hasBoat_Tours ?boat_tours .
  ?maritime_villages a :Maritime_Villages .
  ?maritime_villages_boat_tours p:hasMaritime_Villages ?maritime_villages .
  ?maritime_villages p:name ?name .
  ?boat_tours p:tour_name ?tour_name .
  ?boat_tours p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Could you provide the boat tours for all maritime villages?
queries.sql: select maritime_villages.name , boat_tours.tour_name from Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours join Boat_Tours on Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.boat_tour_id = Boat_Tours.id join Maritime_Villages on Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.maritime_village_id = Maritime_Villages.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?tour_name WHERE {
  ?maritime_villages_boat_tours a :Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours .
  ?boat_tours a :Boat_Tours .
  ?maritime_villages_boat_tours p:hasBoat_Tours ?boat_tours .
  ?maritime_villages a :Maritime_Villages .
  ?maritime_villages_boat_tours p:hasMaritime_Villages ?maritime_villages .
  ?maritime_villages p:name ?name .
  ?boat_tours p:tour_name ?tour_name .
}

queries.question: What are the tour options offered by boat tours in each maritime village?
queries.sql: SELECT Boat_Tours.tour_name  from Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours join Boat_Tours on Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.boat_tour_id = Boat_Tours.id join Maritime_Villages on Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.maritime_village_id = Maritime_Villages.id   GROUP BY Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.boat_tour_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.maritime_village_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Maritime_Villages)

queries.question: For every maritime village, describe the boat tours that they offer.
queries.sql: select maritime_villages.name , boat_tours.description from Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours join Boat_Tours on Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.boat_tour_id = Boat_Tours.id join Maritime_Villages on Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.maritime_village_id = Maritime_Villages.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?maritime_villages_boat_tours a :Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours .
  ?boat_tours a :Boat_Tours .
  ?maritime_villages_boat_tours p:hasBoat_Tours ?boat_tours .
  ?maritime_villages a :Maritime_Villages .
  ?maritime_villages_boat_tours p:hasMaritime_Villages ?maritime_villages .
  ?maritime_villages p:name ?name .
  ?boat_tours p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Describe the boat tours that each maritime village offers
queries.sql: SELECT Boat_Tours.description  from Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours join Boat_Tours on Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.boat_tour_id = Boat_Tours.id join Maritime_Villages on Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.maritime_village_id = Maritime_Villages.id   GROUP BY Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.boat_tour_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.maritime_village_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Maritime_Villages)

queries.question: Show me the names and descriptions of the tours each maritime village offers.
queries.sql: SELECT Boat_Tours.tour_name, Boat_Tours.description  from Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours join Boat_Tours on Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.boat_tour_id = Boat_Tours.id join Maritime_Villages on Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.maritime_village_id = Maritime_Villages.id   GROUP BY Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.boat_tour_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Maritime_Villages_Boat_Tours.maritime_village_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Maritime_Villages)
